completion_readiness.safety_note: Candidate rows are review-only. Source and image URLs require exact product, variant, category, and image identity confirmation before import.

instructions: Review each candidate_source_url as an exact product/detail page before confirmation.
Only fill manual_confirmed_source_url and manual_confirmed_image_url after title, variant, category, and image identity match.
This report is candidate-only; it never mutates catalog data.
For catalog_variant_metadata_enrichment rows, confirm variant metadata first; sub_series, name_ja, and character_name have a supported catalog field importer.

field_review_guidance.manual_value_format: official variant, campaign, collection, or style label exactly as shown on the product/detail page
required_evidence: candidate product/detail page is the exact catalog row variant
value is visible in the product title, official page heading, or official product description
value narrows a broad catalog row without replacing the base series or category
field_review_guidance.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: the value identifies the product variant/campaign and prevents merging multiple designs into one row
do_not_use: generic goods type such as acrylic stand
machine-translated guesses not present on the evidence page

metadata_field_import_template.manual_value_format: official variant, campaign, collection, or style label exactly as shown on the product/detail page
metadata_field_import_template.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: the value identifies the product variant/campaign and prevents merging multiple designs into one row
metadata_field_import_template.review_note: Copy confirmed rows to server/catalog_field_confirmed_rows.json; existing importer supports this field.

metadata_field_import_template.name_ja: 轟焦凍 ラバーストラップ
metadata_field_import_template.search_query: 轟焦凍 ラバーストラップ
metadata_field_import_template.candidate_title: 【グッズ-ストラップ】僕のヒーローアカデミア でかラバーストラップ 05 轟焦凍

field_review_guidance.manual_value_format: official Japanese product name, preserving punctuation, spacing, brackets, prize/campaign wording, and character text
required_evidence: candidate product/detail page is the exact catalog row variant
official Japanese title or heading is visible on the evidence page
variant and character wording match the image/product option being imported
field_review_guidance.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: the official Japanese product name can be copied without abbreviation or translation
do_not_use: series-only names when the candidate is a specific variant
normalized names that remove official brackets, prize labels, or character labels

metadata_field_import_template.manual_value_format: official Japanese product name, preserving punctuation, spacing, brackets, prize/campaign wording, and character text
metadata_field_import_template.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: the official Japanese product name can be copied without abbreviation or translation

field_review_guidance.manual_value_format: official character or option name only; use the source-language name shown by the product page when available
required_evidence: candidate product/detail page is the exact catalog row variant
character or option name is visible in the official title, selected variation, image alt text, or description
for multi-character designs, keep the combined official option name instead of choosing one character
field_review_guidance.manual_confirmed_allowed_when: the product page clearly identifies the represented character/design option
do_not_use: dropping secondary characters from paired or group designs
translated nicknames when the official option name is available
